description.zh-Hans: 生成树皮纹理，带有垂直裂缝、粗糙表面细节、苔藓/地衣点缀和有机纹理图案。完全可平铺。
description.en: Generates tree bark textures with vertical fissures, rough surface detail, moss/lichen accents, and organic grain patterns. Fully tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 树皮, 树干, 树木纹理, 森林
triggers.en: bark, tree trunk, wood texture, forest

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成一棵树干的树皮纹理，可用于环境装饰或道具纹理。
exampleUsage.en: Generates a tree bark texture for environmental decoration or prop texturing.
